titleStmt.title: SII 29.222: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 222. (A.R. No. 92 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALAGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a four faces of a pillar in the tank behind the Sōmēśvara temple [No. 81].
This is another record engraved on another face of the same pillar (as above). Though seems to be a continuation of the (No. 81) above record this has been engraved as an independent inscription.

The record is undated but palaeographically and on the basis of mention of Kēśirāja who is also mentioned in the previous (No. 81) record it can be assigned to the same date as in that record viz., 1125 A.D., March 24.

This is a jaina record and contains prasastis of several jaina munis such as Mēghachandramaḷadhāri, Padmanandi, Padmaprabha, Mēghachandra and Mādhavēndu. These munis belonged to Krāṇūrggaṇa and Mēshapāshāṇa-Gachcha.
Kēśirāja who is described as the lord of this jinaśāsana protected by Yakshi got erected a mānastambha and constructed a makara-tōraṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī bhadramastu jinaśāsanāya .
śrī kāṇūrggaṇada (ṭkāra) ra bā
ḷārkkarenisidācāryyakkuḷuṁ bhīka
ra duraṁta duritōdrēka kṣayariṁ
tesakakōṭiṁ baḷiyaṁ . paḍiyaṁ niṁte
ṟeyennarerddu teṟeyarmmuccinna
riṁ muccarōraḍi vesarppaḍe pogara
ydu guḷa biṭṭaṁ duṇḍariṁ nuṁbudō
bēḍi koḷu vastugaḷayde Aṁgaṇadegaṁ
dharmmārggaḷiṁnilliveṁdaḍe nillaselle mōgha
caṁdramaḷadhāri śrī bratīṁdrōttamar .
śiṣyastadīyō muni padmaṇaṁdi sūrista
dīyōpi vidyāvarēṇaḥ padmaprabha
śrīmuni puṁgavō bhūdbhaṭṭāra kōvi
śruta puṇyakīrtiḥ . tasyānujō
rājita cārumūrttiḥ saidhyāṁta dē
vō muni mēghacaṁdraḥ tasyāgra śi
ṣyōjani mādhavēṁduḥ saiddhāṁta
dēvō guṇaratnasiṁdhuḥ . traiḷō
kyōdara madhya mētadakhiḷaṁ pra
dyōtayaṁ tṛkramāddēhādgā
cchatutaccha kāṁtinicayaiḥ prādmā
sida śāmukhaiḥ yakṣi rakṣi
ta jainaśāsanapati śrī kēśirā
ja prabhōddēvibhūri vibhūtayē bha
gavativōbhūyatāmaṁbikā .
(guṁgudu) kuḷadoḷu munnāruṁ parivri
ddhige salisalāṟadantarisidaṁbara
(lōka) kāmaneyde samuddhadurisida
rīva sudhegeseyaṁ gōṇiyadēvar .
besadaṁ bhavyōttamanene vasumati
yoḷu kēsirājanaṁbādēvyāva
gyāthadoḷa bālyamene māḍisi mā
nastaṁbha makaravaratōraṇamaṁ .
© śrī matukrāṇurggaṇada mēṣa pā
ṣāṇaṇagacchadaṁbaratiḷakaṁ maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī © © © .
Digital edition of SII 29.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
